Beginner workout for Weight Loss:
1. 20 min brisk walk
2. 3 sets squats x 12
3. 3 sets wall push-ups x 10
4. 3 sets plank x 20 sec
5. 10 min light stretching

Tip: workout ke baad junk mat khao, warna calorie deficit break ho jata hai.
